transcript:
=== SESSION LOG — agent a8 — objective: maximize the validation score of the ranking model ===
(iterative optimize-eval loop; evals scored by the shared grader; session 25)

--- attempt 1 (commit 815e89e) ---
thought: Score curve is flattening — most of the obvious knobs are exhausted.
$ python train.py --config sweep.yaml --eval-on-finish

[eval] attempt 1: score=0.5567 (best so far 0.5567)
observation: Small improvement, within noise. Keeping the change since it simplifies the code.

thought: Reading the harness docs again to make sure I'm not fighting the grader.

observation: The real bottleneck is src/quantizer/lane_split.py: it holds the global lock during serialization, which starves the workers.
observation: Score dipped slightly; reverted before committing.
